notes: The file has two near-duplicate injectivity proof blocks (~80 lines each): `addCoordAlgHom_injective_of_baseHom_inj` (lines 857-942) and `addCoordAlgHomPair_injective_of_baseHom_inj` (lines 1156-1231), differing only in single- vs. pair-isogeny naming — a refactor opportunity. The single sorry is in `addPullback_x_ne_const` (a private lemma): the pole-witness `ord_∞(addPullback_x) < 0` is deferred; the axiom-clean sibling `addPullback_x_ne_const_of_pole` packages the conditional form. `minpoly_not_const_degree_two` (158 lines) contains an extensive degree-parity argument over the curve discriminant using `SmoothPlaneCurve` infrastructure, requiring `[NeZero (2 : F)]` (char ≠ 2).
